title: The Invisible Dr. Mabuse
writer: Ladislas Fodor, Artur Brauner, Norbert Jacques
actors: Lex Barker, Karin Dor, Siegfried Lowitz
plot: Evil mastermind Dr. Mabuse seeks Professor Erasmus' secret invention, a device that makes one invisible, but a murder in a revue theatre brings the German police and the FBI into the mix.
